mentions.note: Pure senior housing IPO (100% exposure, vs. Ventas 60%, Welltower 85%); company-operated not just landlord; 10,422 units, 34 communities; 69% FL/TX, 9% Philadelphia; 15 life-plan communities = longer resident tenure; 2.5% yield; Healthpeak retains control/management; smaller than Ventas/Welltower = faster growth potential; right in valuation middle (37x last year FFO); newer story = riskier but 'leap of faith I'd be comfortable making.'
